annotation.text:
The point here is not that images are the easy case--it's that building a *fun to use* prompt evolution system *inside* your workflow engine (claude code does both) is not very hard--you just have to know to ask the agent to build it for you. 

Of course, if you aren't using a coding agent *as your workflow agent*, it can't help you build the tools to make this advice possible, let alone easy.
